displayTitle: Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin
synopsis: Darth Vader's search for the culprits behind an assassination attempt on the Emperor leads to a shattered Star Destroyer floating lifeless above a mysterious moon. On the ground he finds no survivors—instead ancient ruins, and frightening inhabitants. All the while, a hunter follows, waiting for the moment to strike!
title: Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin
